supersedes_baseline: BEM-008 schema_version 2 (single-column status replaced by 4-field model per GPT audit BEM-008 review)

ssot_update_protocol.who_may_update: Curator-Executor role only, and only as part of a task-closure event with an accompanying receipt
ssot_update_protocol.when_updated: Atomically with the closing receipt of the task that changes the row's state — never as a standalone narrative edit
ssot_update_protocol.invalid_update_definition: Any edit to this file without a receipt path in last_receipt_ref pointing to a real governance/proofs/ file is INVALID and must be reverted by the next auditor pass
ssot_update_protocol.derived_documents_rule: AGENT_CONTEXT.md and any human-readable canon document are regenerated FROM this file after it changes — never edited first and back-propagated

rows.planned: Operator message reaches an executing agent reliably and quickly
rows.actual: Telegram -> Cloudflare Worker -> claude.yml proven live (BEM-947)

rows.planned: object_runner -> dispatch_consumer -> curator_router -> dispatch_executor: route by role/provider with fallback policy, honest planned/dispatched/executed states
rows.actual: All components exist as real code. dispatch_executor.py repaired after NameError bug (BEM-948), makes real HTTP calls, writes to dispatch_executed.jsonl
rows.remaining_gap: No live end-to-end trace proving object_runner-triggered task reaches executed/completed automatically without manual bridge

rows.planned: Single universal queue-driven dispatcher reads ACTIVE_QUEUE.json, dispatches next PENDING task workflow
rows.actual: roadmap-autopilot.yml exists, functional, makes direct curl HTTP dispatch to GitHub Actions API
rows.remaining_gap: Does not write to dispatch_executed.jsonl. Evidence not unified with governance-chain trail (BEM-007 decision: unify journal). Operational Contract for Dispatch not yet formalized (BEM-009 addition).

rows.planned: prompt_assembler.py composes static+dynamic prompt per element_prompt_profiles.json + rule_registry.json
rows.actual: prompt_assembler.py real implementation. element_prompt_profiles.json has 10 profiles. rule_registry.json has all 3 COUNCIL rules present and cross-referenced
rows.remaining_gap: Wired correctly at config level; no runtime trace proving *_stage_runner.py actually calls prompt_assembler.py during a live task

rows.planned: Primary=Claude Code Action, honest mechanical fallback, paid OpenAI API permanently prohibited
rows.actual: provider_config.json v1.5 reclassified with billing_class model. Cost policy guard in provider-router.yml. Invalid workflows archived

rows.planned: Governance rules enforced by runtime code, not just documented
rows.actual: RULE-011/012 enforcement verified. Full per-rule matrix now lives in governance/state/rule_enforcement_matrix.json
rows.remaining_gap: RULE-004..010 individual bodies not yet resolved post-BEM-950 (see rule_enforcement_matrix.json RV-2)

rows.planned: 8-stage roadmap P0.5->P7 to reach a working, evidence-backed control contour
rows.actual: 6/8 DONE. P7 receipt already exists with status BLOCKED
rows.remaining_gap: P1 blocked (no run-level evidence). P1-ALT-UNBLOCK attempt 1/3 failed. P2/P3 receipts not clean PASS

rows.planned: Active workspace contains only canonical, currently-relevant files
rows.actual: Hundreds of diagnostic/iteration workflow files and historical MASTER_PROMPT versions remain in active paths
rows.remaining_gap: Archival not yet executed. Now gated by runtime_dependency_manifest.json + protocol_supersession_index.json (BEM-009 precondition artifacts)

rows.planned: AGENT_CONTEXT.md is a derived briefing artifact, regenerated from SSOT, never a source of truth itself
rows.actual: File exists; historically hand-updated during BEM-948 P1
rows.remaining_gap: Regeneration mechanism from architecture_plan_fact_gap.json not yet implemented (BEM-009 roadmap task)
